data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of real-time availability sync to ClassPass, but there is no evidence presented that confirms this functionality is implemented or operational. The linked use case outlines the need for this sync, yet the prior steps do not include any checks or validations related to the availability sync, indicating a clear gap in the evidence. Specifically, the absence of any evidence or steps that demonstrate the real-time sync capability leads to the conclusion that this requirement is not covered.
gaps: No evidence of real-time availability sync to ClassPass being validated or completed.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
